failure_reason: GradCAM incompatible with Vision Transformer architecture
technical_note: Standard GradCAM requires 4D convolutional feature maps (B, C, H, W). ViT-B16 uses 1D token sequences (B, N, D) from its MultiheadAttention layers. The target layer ln_1 (LayerNorm before attention) produces gradients of shape (B, N, D) which GradCAM cannot interpret as spatial heatmaps. This is a known limitation — ViT requires attention-map based explainability methods such as Attention Rollout, GradSAM, or DINO self-supervised attention visualization instead.
recommended_alternative: Use pytorch_grad_cam.methods.vit_explainability (GradSAM) or the attention rollout method for ViT explainability in Phase 2B.
phase2b_action: Implement Attention Rollout or GradSAM for ViT-B16 explainability after full cloud GPU training.
